# CheckInfoTag

## UnrecommendedInfoTag

<!-- 'Description' and 'Properties' sections are auto-generated. -->
<!-- DON'T TOUCH ME - I'M USED BY VALIDATOR DOC AUTO-GENERATION CODE -->

### Details

If a default value is defined in the Info tag, the generation of information events for this parameter will be enabled by default when a new alarm template is created.
This can result in a large number of information events being generated without the user being aware that this was enabled.

For this reason, it is not recommended to define a default value in the Info tag unless information events are explicitly required for that parameter.
